"desc": "

TOYOMI AuraBreeze Air Cooler AC 8868 – Unleash the Ultimate Cooling Experience. 🌬️❄️

Meet the TOYOMI AuraBreeze Air Cooler AC 8868—where powerful cooling meets total comfort. Equipped with a 12L water tank and 360° oscillation, it cools spaces up to 50m² with a long 9m airflow distance, ensuring every corner feels refreshingly cool. (Airflow re-tested and updated to 9m—packaging and manuals may show previous specs.)

Customizable airflow with three speeds and wind modes lets you tailor your experience, while the included ice packs amplify the chill for those scorching days. Whisper-quiet performance ensures that comfort never comes at the cost of peace. 

Effortlessly portable with smooth roller wheels, it’s not just a cooler—it’s the key to ultimate comfort, wherever you need it. How to Use with Cooling/Humidifying Mode: 1. Fill in water in the water tank from the top slot or bottom drawer. 

2. Turn on the air cooler and select the desired wind speed.

3. Press “Cooling/Humidifier” button to activate the function

✅ Stay Extra Cool with Cooling/Humidifying Function

Combines powerful airflow with added humidity to cool and refresh the air, keeping your space comfortable even in dry conditions. ✅ Effortlessly portable with smooth roller wheels Ultimate comfort, wherever you need it.

✅ Powerful Yet Quiet Airflow – Cools up to 9m and can cool down room up to 50m2 covers a large area, guaranteeing your room stays cool and comfortable even on the hottest days (Airflow re-tested and updated to 9m—packaging and manuals may show previous specs.)

✅ 360° Oscillation for Customisable Cooling Comfort

Distributes cool air evenly across the room, ensuring that every corner feels the cooling effect

✅ 3 Speed Modes 

Choose between Low, Medium, and High fan speeds for a cooling experience tailored to your preferences

✅ 3 Wind Modes

Switch between Normal, Natural, and Sleep modes for customized airflow and optimal comfort throughout the day.

✅ Detachable Side and Back HoneyComb Filters

Enhance the cooling efficiency by providing a large surface area for water evaporation which is durable and easy to maintain

✅ 12L Water Tank

Large, removable top-fill water tank ensures easy filling and maintenance, allowing for continuous cooling and humidification

✅ Control Panel 

Easy to Use interface that allows you to select fan speeds, cooling modes, and timers for seamless operation

✅ Display Panel

Clear and easy-to-read that shows all key settings, including fan speed, mode, and timer at a glance

✅ Roller Wheels

Smooth and sturdy wheels allow easy movement, so you can effortlessly position the cooler wherever it’s needed

✅ 2 Free Ice Packs

Ice packs can be added to the top water tank for an extra cooling boost during hot days

✅ Easy Assembly

Allows for quick assembly with just four parts, making cleaning easy ✅ Comes with Remote Control

Easy control from any corner of your room for ease of use.

AC 8868

⭐ Who Are We

Simplus provides high quality home appliances for all customers in South East Asia. We produce well-designed, reliable, easy-to-use and cost-effective smart products to make life up easily. From personal healthy to home improvement, we help you make the most out of every day.

⭐ Product Features

1. Extra-large water tank for long-lasting cooling.

Tested full capacity up to 47L, 30L at MAX water line.

One fill supports 32H+ continuous cooling, reducing frequent refills for all-day home comfort.

2. Powerful airflow for 40–80㎡ large spaces

Max wind speed up to 7m/s

(Level 1: 5m/s · Level 2: 6m/s · Level 3: 7m/s)

Max airflow reaches 5000m³/h for strong, stable cooling performance.

Airflow reaches up to 10m, easily covering living rooms, bedrooms, and other large spaces.

3. Noticeable cooling for greater comfort

Three-sided large cooling pads

Cooling temperature drops up to 3℃ with ice packs added.

1600ml/h vaporation rate for visible cooling performance.

*Cooling performance may vary depending on temperature and humidity.

4. Smart features: Timer, 3 speeds, natural wind & remote Control

Supports up to 12H timer with 1-hour adjustable intervals.

3 Fan speeds for different cooling needs, from gentle breeze to strong airflow.

Natural wind mode delivers softer, more comfortable airflow.

Long-range remote control for convenient operation.

5. Low-noise operation for undisturbed comfort

Tested noise level ≤50dB.

Quiet operation suitable for sleeping, working, and daily use.

6. Energy-saving & eco-friendly cooling

100W Rated power, using far less energy than traditional air conditioners for lower electricity costs.

Physical cooling with reusable ice packs, no refrigerants required.

Eco-friendly, safe, and healthier for everyday use.

7. User-friendly design, durable & practical

Vertical airflow adjustable up to 100° manually.

120° Automatic oscillation for wider air coverage.

Includes 2 ice packs, ready after 1 hour of freezing, with up to 2 hours of cooling per use.

Durable PP+ABS housing with universal wheels for easy movement between rooms.

Cooling pads last up to 3 years, reducing replacement costs and maintenance hassle.

Note:

1. Disconnect power before adding water.

2. Freeze the ice packs before use for cooling effect.

3. Drain the water tank when not in use for a long time.

4. Use distilled or purified water only. Do not add cleaners, essential oils, or chemicals.

5. Do not insert fingers or sharp objects into the air vents.

Water Filling Instructions:

1. Ensure the water tank is properly installed.

2. Open the top cover.

3. Add purified or distilled water into the filling tray. Water will flow into the lower tank. Check the water level through the viewing window and do not exceed the MAX line.

⭐ Simplus After-Sales Policy

- Customers have the option to return/refund the product if they are dissatisfied with it or if it has quality issues after 15 days of receiving it, along with images and reasoning.

- Returns are not accepted for used, damaged, or non-resalable items.

- If you encounter a warehouse error or send incomplete product parts, please notify the customer care via live chat, and we will resolve the issue for the customer as quickly as possible.

- If the buyer keeps the device for more than 15 days, Simplus provides a one-year warranty (exchange only, no repair). The customer must be a simplus member and can reach out to customer care via live chat for more details on the Simplus one-year guarantee and scope of use.

⭐ Note

- When unboxing the package, customers should photograph the goods to expedite after-sales handling if there is an issue with it.

- The one-year guarantee may only be used once per order.

- If an order is returned for reasons other than product quality, the client is liable for the return shipping expenses.

✨ 4-in-1 portable air cooling fan: With a regular fan mode (no water or ice needed), a humidifier mode (just add water), a portable air conditioner mode (add water and ice), and a night light function, this product is perfect for all of your cooling needs. ✨ Large water tank +Ice cube: You can add water in the water tank, A full tank of water can continuously keep spraying for 3-8 hours (depending on the speed of fan ). Or after freezing the ice cube,Put into the cooler to use,The latter cools the air faster.

✨ 3 Cool Mist & Speeds & 7 Night Light: 3 kinds of wind speed regulation to meet your different needs。

✨You can use the small evaporative air cooler all year round, cooling you in hot summer and humidifying the air in dry autumn and winter. keep yourself away from dry, hot air and enjoy the mist.

✨ USB interface power supply: Charging plug power, vehicle USB power supply, charging Po power supply, computer power supply, very convenient.

标题: LYFRO BLAST Portable UVC Purifying Air Cooler With Touch Control and Adjustable Airflow Speed
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Specifications SKU 1018964762_SGAMZ-3747508244 Capacity in Milliliters 500 Room Size 0 Air Cooler Features Portable Model LYFRO BLAST Portable UVC Purifying Air Cooler With Touch Control and Adjustable Airflow Speed What’s in the box 1 x LYFRO BLAST Portable UVC Purifying Air Cooler With Touch Control and Adjustable Airflow Speed Highlights Dual Air Stream Purification Atmospheric air goes through humidification with sterilised water before passing through the nanosilver ion filter to cool you with purified air. UV-C WATER STERILIZATION • Inner UV-C lamp provides germicidal rays for water sterilization • Eliminates harmful bacteria and pathogens present in water NANOSILVER ION AIR FILTER • Limits contamination in the tank and purifies cooled air • Reusable and washable with easy removal for cleaning once every 2 months Touch Panel + LED Display - Convenient touch control and LED indicator to display selected speed for ease of use. Aromatherapy Option - Aromatherapy oil can be added for a pleasant smell to facilitate better sleep. Quiet Operation - With enhanced noise reduction during use for a quiet cooling environment. Versatile USB Interface - Compatible with various power sources such as wall charger, laptop or power bank. Energy-Efficient Design - Low energy consumption supports 12 hours of use when powered with 10000mAh power bank. Humidification Mode - Provides a comfortable cool breeze if the surrounding air is dry . Simply Add Water for Instant Cooling ( Cooled by 5-8°C With Ice ) 500ML CAPACITY Array of 7 Colors for Ambient Lighting Portable Siz e - Weighs only 800g with low energy consumption for cool air anywhere. Rapid 5°C Cooling - With enhanced atomisation for instant 5°C cooler breeze (Rapid Cooling With Powerful Air Stream Enhanced atomiser provides rapid temperature drop for strong focused cooling in mere seconds, wherever and whenever you need it.) Precise Speed Control - With single touch panel to select from 3 different wind speeds. 2X Stronger Airflow - Delivers powerful cooling with wide area distribution up to 5ft . ", "highlights": "

Dual Air Stream Purification Atmospheric air goes through humidification with sterilised water before passing through the nanosilver ion filter to cool you with purified air.

 

UV-C WATER STERILIZATION

• Inner UV-C lamp provides germicidal rays for water sterilization

• Eliminates harmful bacteria and pathogens present in water

 

NANOSILVER ION AIR FILTER

• Limits contamination in the tank and purifies cooled air

• Reusable and washable with easy removal for cleaning once every 2 months

 

Touch Panel + LED Display - Convenient touch control and LED indicator to display selected speed for ease of use.

Aromatherapy Option - Aromatherapy oil can be added for a pleasant smell to facilitate better sleep.

Quiet Operation - With enhanced noise reduction during use for a quiet cooling environment.

Versatile USB Interface - Compatible with various power sources such as wall charger, laptop or power bank.

Energy-Efficient Design - Low energy consumption supports 12 hours of use when powered with 10000mAh power bank.

Humidification Mode - Provides a comfortable cool breeze if the surrounding air is dry.

Simply Add Water for Instant Cooling ( Cooled by 5-8°C With Ice )

500ML CAPACITY

Array of 7 Colors for Ambient Lighting

 

Portable Size - Weighs only 800g with low energy consumption for cool air anywhere.

Rapid 5°C Cooling - With enhanced atomisation for instant 5°C cooler breeze (Rapid Cooling With Powerful Air Stream Enhanced atomiser provides rapid temperature drop for strong focused cooling in mere seconds, wherever and whenever you need it.)

Precise Speed Control - With single touch panel to select from 3 different wind speeds.

2X Stronger Airflow - Delivers powerful cooling with wide area distribution up to 5ft.

Smart Wi-Fi Control: Stay cool effortlessly with built-in Wi-Fi functionality. Use your smartphone to control your air cooler from anywhere—whether you're at work, on your way home, or just relaxing on the couch.

Improved Air Quality: Features with an ionizer function that releases negative ions that help purify the air by attaching to particles like dust, allergens, and pollutants.

  • Max. Air Volume: 800m3/h

  • Wind modes: 3 modes (Normal, Natural and Sleep)

  • Product Weight: 7.8 Kg

  • Product Dimension: W270 x D325 x H1063mm
